name: Marketing Essentials Pack
description: Essential marketing prompts for campaigns, content, and strategy development

prompts.title: Product Launch Email
prompts.description: Craft compelling product launch announcement emails

variables.name: key_benefits
variables.example: 10x faster prompt creation, AI-powered optimization, team collaboration

input.key_benefits: AI scheduling, automatic meeting prep, time blocking

examples.output:
Subject: 🚀 Smart Calendar is here - Never miss another important meeting

Dear Professional,

We're excited to announce the launch of Smart Calendar - the AI-powered scheduling assistant built specifically for busy professionals like you.

Starting March 15th, you can:
• Let AI handle your scheduling conflicts automatically
• Get meeting briefs prepared before every call
• Use intelligent time blocking for focused work

Early bird pricing: Just $15/month (regular price $25)

[Start Your Free Trial] [Learn More]

To your productivity,
The Smart Calendar Team

prompts.title: Social Media Content Creator
prompts.description: Generate engaging social media posts for different platforms

variables.name: topic
variables.example: productivity tips, product feature, industry news

variables.name: brand_voice
variables.example: friendly expert, authoritative, casual and fun

variables.name: content_goal
variables.example: drive traffic, build awareness, generate leads

variables.name: cta
variables.description: What action you want people to take
variables.example: visit website, download guide, share post

prompts.title: Value Proposition Generator

variables.name: problem
variables.example: Teams waste time on manual project coordination

variables.name: benefits
variables.example: Save 10 hours/week, reduce missed deadlines, improve communication

variables.name: differentiators
variables.example: AI automatically predicts delays and suggests optimizations

variables.name: proof_points
variables.example: Used by 1000+ teams, 95% reduction in missed deadlines

prompts.title: Competitive Analysis Framework
prompts.description: Analyze competitors and identify market opportunities
prompts.content:
Conduct a competitive analysis for {{your_business}} in the {{industry}} space.

Main competitors: {{competitors}}
Focus areas: {{focus_areas}}

Analyze each competitor on:
1. Target market and positioning
2. Products/services offered
3. Pricing strategy
4. Marketing approach
5. Strengths and weaknesses
6. Market share and growth

Then identify:
- Market gaps and opportunities
- Potential threats
- Differentiation strategies
- Recommended actions

Provide a summary with key insights and strategic recommendations.

prompts.title: Customer Persona Builder
prompts.description: Create detailed customer personas for marketing targeting
prompts.content:
Help me create a detailed customer persona for {{product_or_service}}.

Based on this information:
- Business type: {{business_type}}
- Target market data: {{market_data}}
- Current customer insights: {{customer_insights}}

Create a comprehensive persona including:

**Demographics**: Age, location, income, education
**Psychographics**: Values, interests, lifestyle
**Professional**: Job title, company size, responsibilities
**Pain Points**: Main challenges and frustrations
**Goals**: What they want to achieve
**Behavior**: How they research and make decisions
**Media Consumption**: Where they get information
**Messaging**: How to communicate with them effectively

Give the persona a name and write a day-in-the-life scenario.

variables.name: market_data
variables.description: Any market research or data you have
variables.example: SMBs with 10-100 employees, struggling with lead nurturing

variables.name: customer_insights
variables.description: What you know about current customers
variables.example: Mostly marketing managers, value time-saving features
